text: Here in this modern, glass-enclosed environment, I pause before the bold declaration of 'R+D'—a space that promises innovation and inquiry. The interplay of orange and blue on the walls stirs a sense of curiosity in me, a vibrant testament to human creativity. Surrounded by reminders of safety and progress, I feel a juxtaposition: the calm order of the space is energized by the potential of new ideas forming. I am both an observer and a participant in this unfolding narrative of discovery.
